summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ideas View Evolution-focused refactor with all key features working perfectly
passed_tests: Ideas View displays with light theme (white backgrounds throughout)
V1 Pattern (Rectangle) visible as Ghost pattern when V1 selected
V2 Pattern (Triangle) visible as Active pattern with solid, bright styling
Version boundary line with V2 badge visible on chart overlay
Confidence evolution line visible (62% → 78%) in probability block
Time separation working - past vs current pattern display via version switching
IDEA HUD displays correct info in canvas overlay (BTC·4H, V2-Triangle, 78%, WIN)
Bottom panel shows Evolution (Rectangle → Triangle) with dates
Replay button functional with replay indicator animation
Chart panning/zooming works with overlay synchronized
Multiple pattern types tested: Rectangle→Triangle (BTC), Ascending Triangle (ETH), Head&Shoulders (SOL)
Filter functionality working (All: 3 ideas, Active: 1 idea, Win: 1 idea, Loss: 1 idea)
Refresh functionality working correctly
Chart mode toggle between Idea and Performance modes working
All 6 insight blocks present: Evolution, Probability, Key Levels, What Next, Result, Version Timeline
Version timeline buttons (V1, V2) functional for pattern switching
Result badges showing correct status (Breakout UP, Active, Wrong)
Confidence values and changes displayed correctly (+16% improvement)
Key levels showing breakout ($71,500) and invalidation ($68,500) prices
Performance mode with badge display working
